name: Auria's VIP
description: A golden crest on your neck shows your companionship with the peppy entrepreneur Auria, and enhances your treasure-seeking abilities. {i}Badatata!{/i} Increases your Luck by 7 and item drop rates by 20%. However, 10% of the Eros you loot are funneled to Auria to maintain your bond... and out of your own newfound enjoyment of getting your money drained.
